name: Invoked Purgatrio
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>召</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>プルガトリオ
desc:
"Aleister the Invoker" + 1 FIRE monster
This card gains 200 ATK for each card your opponent controls. Can attack all monsters your opponent controls, once each. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

summoning: Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
